message:
fix: harden flake classifier tmp detection and replace RPC panics with graceful shutdown

flake_classifier.rs: Narrow the TmpdirRace detection to require path
separators ("/tmp", "\\tmp") or the explicit "tmpdir" token instead of
bare "tmp", which was causing false-positive transient classifications
on any error message that happened to contain "tmp" as a substring.

rpc.rs: Replace two `panic!()` calls in the prompt cancel-inherit
output channel handlers with `tracing::warn!` + graceful loop breaks.
A disconnected output channel during cancellation is a normal shutdown
race, not an unrecoverable error — panicking here crashed the agent
unnecessarily.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
